provenance.source_corpus: Life-history and phenotypic traits of insectivorous songbirds breeding on reclaimed mine land reveal ecological constraints

source_spans.text: Supplemental feeding of bluebirds also was used to experimentally assess nutritional limitation of birds feeding on terrestrial invertebrates.
females that initiated breeding earlier in the season produced larger clutches, as did those that received supplemental food
Bluebirds on reclaimed land initiated clutches later
Bluebirds on reclaimed land initiated clutches later
Bluebirds on reclaimed land... had lower fledging success compared to birds on the reference area.
In 2012, nestling MOBL in supplemented broods on HVC were structurally smaller, weighed less and developed shorter flight feathers than control broods
In contrast, supplementation in 2013 increased all nestling measures on HVC relative to control broods
Body mass of nestling TRES... decreased with hatching date
